item.title: ZW COLLECTION

item.author: zara

item.title: AARON LEVINE x ZARA
item.description:
AARON LEVINE x ZARA

For this second collection, inspiration travels to remote beaches where the sun saturates garments with vivid color.
Salt, wind, and sea air gradually wear down fabrics, creating a naturally aged texture that evokes a distinct vintage sensibility.

Thank you @demeester.quentin @virgileelana @marie_marot
Photographer @studio_jackson
@aaronplevine #zara
item.author: zara

item.title: TRF COVERS
item.description:
TRF COVERS

#zara #zarawoman
item.author: zara

item.title: Zara presents Calma, an immersive installation offering a restful, sensorial experience at Palazzina Appiani. The space transforms into a peaceful esc...
item.description:
Zara presents Calma, an immersive installation offering a restful, sensorial experience at Palazzina Appiani. The space transforms into a peaceful escape from the city’s crowds, set within the serenity of Parco Sempione.

The project reinterprets the logic of ancient Roman thermae as a contemporary system of retreat, unfolding through a sequence of environments structured to settle perception. Created in partnership with Crosby Studios, it invites visitors to pause, reflect, and immerse themselves in a moment of calm.

Salone del Mobile 2026 | April 21 — 26
Palazzina Appiani, Viale Giorgio Byron 2, Milan

Book your visit at zara.com/it

#zara
item.author: zara

item.title: DYLAN’S T-SHIRT CLUB X ZARA
item.description:
DYLAN’S T-SHIRT CLUB X ZARA
A collection of hand-drawn T-shirts by Dylan, bringing bold characters and vibrant color to life.

Dylan’s T-shirt Club @dylanstshirtclub
Thank you @ansleygulielmi @clement_laguardia1
Photography: @danmartensen
#zara
